description: Create and capture orders with platform fees, payment splitting, and disbursement controls

required_headers.PayPal-Auth-Assertion: JWT asserting partner is acting on behalf of seller

paypal_auth_assertion.description: JWT that identifies the partner and the seller merchant_id
paypal_auth_assertion.note: Required when partner creates orders on behalf of seller

disbursement_modes.INSTANT: Funds disbursed to seller immediately after capture
disbursement_modes.DELAYED: Funds held by PayPal — platform controls release

platform_fee_rules: Fee currency must match purchase_units currency
Platform fee payee must have a bank account on their PayPal account
Fees settle daily into the bank account on the partner account
Platform fee not supported for first-party integrations
Total platform fees cannot exceed the purchase unit amount

capture.result: Funds split: seller receives (amount - platform_fee), platform receives platform_fee

refund_with_fee.note: Include platform_fees in refund to also refund the platform fee to the buyer
